title: Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4 is available for batch inference in US regions
body:
Mosaic AI Model Serving now supports Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4 for batch inference workflows. You can now use [`databricks-claude-sonnet-4`](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis/supported-models#claude-sonnet-4) in your `ai_query` requests to perform batch inference.

* See [Enrich data using AI Functions](/aws/en/large-language-models/ai-functions) for an example.
* See [Supported foundation models on Model Serving](/aws/en/machine-learning/model-serving/foundation-model-overview) for region availability.

ref_links.text: Supported foundation models on Model Serving
